idx_branches_one_main.name: idx_branches_one_main
idx_branches_one_main.where: is_main = TRUE AND deleted_at IS NULL

email_or_phone.name: email_or_phone
email_or_phone.value: email IS NOT NULL OR phone IS NOT NULL

auth_method.name: auth_method
auth_method.value: (role IN ('cashier') AND pin_hash IS NOT NULL) OR (role NOT IN ('cashier') AND password_hash IS NOT NULL)

idx_phone_units_serial_hash.name: idx_phone_units_serial_hash
idx_phone_units_serial_hash.where: serial_number_hash IS NOT NULL AND deleted_at IS NULL

idx_variants_barcode.name: idx_variants_barcode
idx_variants_barcode.where: barcode IS NOT NULL AND deleted_at IS NULL

idx_products_barcode.name: idx_products_barcode
idx_products_barcode.where: barcode IS NOT NULL AND deleted_at IS NULL

valid_prices.name: valid_prices
valid_prices.value: cost_price >= 0 AND retail_price >= cost_price AND (min_price IS NULL OR min_price >= cost_price)

idx_customers_passport_hash.name: idx_customers_passport_hash
idx_customers_passport_hash.where: passport_hash IS NOT NULL AND deleted_at IS NULL

idx_customers_blacklist.name: idx_customers_blacklist
idx_customers_blacklist.where: is_blacklisted = TRUE AND deleted_at IS NULL

valid_debt_amounts.name: valid_debt_amounts
valid_debt_amounts.value: paid_amount >= 0 AND paid_amount <= total_amount AND remaining_amount = total_amount - paid_amount
